dead_ends.goal: Direct oracle calls for A/B control vs treatment with deterministic eval.py
dead_ends.reason: Oracle is deterministic — patch status irrelevant to output. Must test at live-inf orchestration level.

known_facts: paradigm_communication goal has baseline score ~0.935-0.954 (from live-inf iter 3-4)
paradigm_communication eval.py is a DETERMINISTIC Python oracle — no LLM calls, always scores same code the same way
Direct oracle runs cannot test A/B patch effect — both conditions yield identical scores (0.954)
Proper A/B for skill_patch requires live-inf orchestration runs: measure convergence trajectory, not final oracle call
Real treatment trajectory (4 live-inf iters, patches accumulating): 0.835 → 0.915 → 0.935 → 0.954 (+0.119 total)
Control baseline (no patches) requires a separate live-inf run from same starting code state to be valid comparison
